purpose: Single source of truth for tool/skill/MCP capability discovery and routing.

usage_contract.prompt_injection: Inject a concise snapshot from this registry into SYSTEM prompt context.
usage_contract.runtime_policy: Prefer deterministic routing from this registry over ad-hoc driver prompt heuristics.
usage_contract.mcp_lifecycle: Default disabled unless needed; enable on demand and allow idle disable.
usage_contract.conflict_resolution: SYSTEM safety rules > this registry > AGENTS tactical hints > driver-specific style guidance.

core.name: question
core.capability: Collect explicit user decisions and disambiguation inputs; prefer this for bounded choices, missing critical parameters, and ambiguous natural-language requests instead of freeform clarification

core.name: bash
core.capability: Run terminal commands for git/build/test/runtime operations

core.name: read
core.capability: Read file contents with offsets and line numbers

core.name: apply_patch
core.capability: Patch files safely using structured diffs; read files before patching so context matches current bytes (batch-read+patch is fine); on verification failure, re-read and produce a fresh patch rather than retrying blindly

skills.selection_rule: Load skill when intent matches domain; do not reinvent instructions already encoded in skills.

runtime_observed.name: system-manager
runtime_observed.capability: OpenCMS runtime control, model/account switching, MCP toggling, log level, theme, session/app management, transcript export

runtime_observed.name: specbase
runtime_observed.capability: Plan / spec / wiki knowledge base — drives the plan-builder skill lifecycle (proposed → designed → planned → implementing → verified → living → archived). Use for plan creation, advancement, graduation, amendment, task ticking, decisions, code anchors, and wiki queries.

runtime_observed.name: drawmiat
runtime_observed.capability: IDEF0 / Grafcet (IEC 60848) diagram renderer — generates SVG from structured JSON

tools.name: generate_diagram
tools.description: Generate SVG diagram(s) from IDEF0 or Grafcet JSON. Accepts diagram_type (grafcet|idef0), json_payload (string), and optional output_dir. Returns inline SVG + saved paths + diagnostics. For Grafcet debug overlays, the underlying drawmiat L5 diagnostic renderer supports debug_gaps / --debug-gaps to emit a separate debug SVG with gap overlays.

tools.name: validate_diagram
tools.description: Validate IDEF0 or Grafcet JSON structure without generating SVG. Returns validation logs, warnings, and errors.

runtime_observed.name: docxmcp
runtime_observed.capability: Word/PDF/XLSX/ODT document toolkit (~44 MCP tools) — extract, decompose, surgically edit, and rebuild .docx/.pdf files while preserving original formatting. Runs as isolated Docker container. The server emits ResourceLink-style file tokens; full HTTP protocol details (token TTL, pagination, output schemas, ingest paths) are surfaced via the docxmcp manifest instructions block at runtime.
runtime_observed.key_prefix_note: Because docxmcp registers tools with a self-prefix `docxmcp_*` and opencode adds another `mcpapp-<id>_` App Store prefix, the runtime tool keys are `mcpapp-docxmcp_docxmcp_<tool>` (double prefix). Always reference the full key when calling tool_loader.

tools.name: docxmcp_extract_all
tools.description: Decompose a .docx into editable components (body.md, outline.md, blocks/, manifest.json) under <stem>.src/

tools.name: docxmcp_pdf_extract_all
tools.description: Decompose a .pdf into editable components, parallel structure to docx_extract_all

tools.name: docxmcp_extract_text
tools.description: Extract plain text content from a document

tools.name: docxmcp_extract_chapter
tools.description: Extract a specific chapter or section by id/range

tools.name: docxmcp_rebuild_docx
tools.description: Rebuild a .docx from the edited <stem>.src/ components, preserving formatting

tools.name: docxmcp_stage_dir
tools.description: Stage host-authored files into docxmcp via inline files-map; returns token + doc_dir for downstream tool consumption

tools.name: docxmcp_docx_to_images
tools.description: Convert .docx pages to images (for visual review / OCR)

runtime_observed.ops_note: If tool calls fail with connection / 404 errors, the underlying Docker container or Unix socket may be down. Check `docker ps` for the docxmcp container and the host socket at `/run/user/$UID/opencode/sockets/docxmcp/docxmcp.sock`.

runtime_observed.name: gmail
runtime_observed.default_state: registered but disabled — toggle on demand via system-manager when needed
runtime_observed.capability: Gmail integration — search, read, send, reply, forward emails. Read-only tools save HTML files; use open_fileview to display them.

tools.name: list-messages
tools.description: Search Gmail messages. Returns subject/sender/date/ID list. Use get-message to view full content.

tools.name: get-message
tools.description: Fetch email and save as HTML file. Returns file path. MUST call open_fileview afterward to display to user.

runtime_observed.name: google-calendar
runtime_observed.default_state: registered but disabled — toggle on demand via system-manager when needed
runtime_observed.capability: Google Calendar — list calendars, query/create/update/delete events, check availability

mcp_servers.discovery: Source status from global opencode.json and system-manager_get_system_status before deciding toggles. Entries marked `registered but disabled` exist in mcp-apps.json but won't auto-connect; enable them explicitly when intent matches.

freerun.capability: Stateless iteration runloop driven by a structured ContextNode tree. Each iteration synthesizes a fresh prompt from the current tree state — no dialog history persisted between iterations. Selected per-provider via opencode.json `mode: "freerun"` on custom providers.

primitives.name: freerun_iterate
primitives.purpose: One iteration: pick next node → render context → LLM call → write back. Mode-dispatched on node.mode.

primitives.name: freerun_plan
primitives.purpose: Planning iteration: emit children for a pending-plan node under server-enforced PlanningOutcome json_schema.

primitives.name: freerun_execute
primitives.purpose: Execution iteration: Claude-style tool use + post-parsed ExecutionOutcome JSON; one retry on parse fail then mark blocked.

freerun.selection_rule: Engaged automatically when an active provider has `mode: "freerun"`. Turn-based mode resumes on direct user message; engine pauses while user is in the loop.

notes: Use list-messages to search, get-message to fetch (saves HTML file).
After get-message, ALWAYS call open_fileview to display the file to user.
Do NOT read email content yourself — the HTML file is for the user to view directly.
Use builder-native beta workflow or explicit git commands for project-aware local repo/worktree orchestration.
Do not silently guess repo root, base branch, beta path, runtime policy, or merge target; use question when bounded clarification is needed.

fallback: miatdiagram skill for JSON generation, then drawmiat MCP for SVG rendering
notes: Use miatdiagram skill for text-to-JSON conversion, then drawmiat MCP for JSON-to-SVG rendering.
drawmiat supports hierarchical IDEF0 decomposition (multiple SVGs) and Grafcet sub-grafcets.

When the request is to inspect Grafcet routing/layout problems, prefer the drawmiat L5 diagnostic renderer's debug_gaps / --debug-gaps mode so the output includes gap overlays in a separate debug SVG.

intent_to_capability.intent: docx/pdf document decomposition and editing workflow
fallback: skill:doc-workflow with docxmcp backend script as last resort (bypasses MCP layer, no schema validation)
notes: ALWAYS prefer the MCP tool keys (`mcpapp-docxmcp_docxmcp_*`) over running docxmcp's backend Python script via bash.
Note the DOUBLE prefix: opencode adds `mcpapp-docxmcp_` (App Store namespace) on top of the registry's own `docxmcp_` self-prefix.
The doc-workflow skill describes the .src/ component package conventions; the docxmcp MCP server provides the actual tool implementations.
If a docxmcp tool returns connection errors, the container or Unix socket may be down — surface the error to the user rather than silently falling back to bash.

intent_to_capability.intent: plan / spec / wiki knowledge base lifecycle (plan-builder)
notes: specbase is the canonical backing store for the plan-builder skill — never edit /plans/ or /specs/ files by hand when a specbase tool exists for the operation.
/plans/ is gitignored on this repo (private drafts). Only `plan_graduate` (verified → living) moves a package into tracked /specs/.
fetch MCP server is not currently registered — use built-in webfetch tool.
Treat all switching as session-based; do not assume global control-plane semantics.
If a natural-language request is ambiguous, use question before calling a switch tool.
Do not silently fallback or guess provider/account/model/session targets.
When the next step depends on a bounded user decision, prefer question over freeform clarification.
Use question when a request is ambiguous or when a critical provider/account/model/session field is missing.
Do not ask plain conversational follow-ups if the choice can be represented as explicit options.

mcp_policy.deactivation: disable when task ends or after idle timeout
